title: Support concat assignment to packed array
body:
This code:

 ```
   wire [31:0] arr [0:7];
   assign arr[0:7] = {
                       {16'hffff, 16'h0000},
                       {16'h0000, 16'h0000},
                       {16'h0a0a, 16'h0000},
                       {16'ha0a0, 16'h0000},
                       {16'hffff, 16'h0000},
                       {16'h0000, 16'h0000},
                       {16'h0a0a, 16'h0000},
                       {16'ha0a0, 16'h0000}
                       };
 ```
 
Gives  %Error-UNSUPPORTED: Unsupported: Replication to form 'logic[31:0]$[0:7]' data type

Using a pattern assignment "'{" is a workaround.

V3Width should convert such concats to pattern assignments automatically to support this.
